title: Mekanism Addon: Rotten Flesh To Bio Fuel
description: This mod brings back the Mekanism feature of crushing rotten flesh to biofuel.
body:
Rotten Flesh to Biofuel (Mekanism Addon)

Something wrong with the mod? Give me a message in [Discord](https://discord.gg/PXRzpddyHR)!


**Description:**

The "Rotten Flesh to Biofuel" mod is an addon for Mekanism in Minecraft 1.20.1 that allows players to convert rotten flesh into biofuel. This mod is perfect for players who are tired of accumulating useless rotten flesh from fighting zombies and want to turn it into something more valuable.

**Features:**

- **Biofuel Production:** Using Mekanism's machines, you can now process rotten flesh into biofuel, providing a renewable energy source for your advanced machinery.
- **Balanced Recipes:** The mod adds balanced recipes that integrate smoothly with the existing Mekanism mechanics, ensuring that converting rotten flesh to biofuel remains a fair but rewarding process.
- **Compatibility:** Fully compatible with other Mekanism features and compatible mods, ensuring a seamless experience in your modded Minecraft world.

**How to Use:**

1. **Gather Rotten Flesh:** Collect rotten flesh by defeating zombies or by other means.
2. **Process in a Crusher:** Use the Mekanism Crusher to convert the rotten flesh into 2 biofuel.
3. **Use Biofuel:** Utilize the biofuel in your machinery for a variety of energy-related tasks within the Mekanism mod.

**Installation:**

1. Ensure you have Minecraft 1.20.1 installed with Forge and Mekanism.
2. Download and place the "rftb<MC_Version>-<MOD_Version.jar" file into your Minecraft "mods" folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and enjoy the new functionality!

**Notes:**

This mod is intended to provide a useful application for the often-overlooked rotten flesh item in Minecraft, giving players a new way to manage resources and maintain energy efficiency within their worlds. Make sure to explore other features of Mekanism to fully optimize your energy systems!
